src: With this editor, you can simultaneously code and view the changes made to your HTML (including CSS and JS). Its Web Based Editor is ideal for anyone who simply wants to quickly write and execute some code without having to open an application.
ja: このエディタでは、HTML（CSS・JS含む）を書きながら変更を同時にプレビューできます。Webベースのエディタなので、アプリを開かずにサッとコードを書いて実行したい人に最適です。
